name: Garten Banban vs Poppy
description: Come play The Game where Rainbow Friends vs Poppy Play Time are the fighting, After Red makes a mysterious force, the worlds of Rainbow Friends and Poppy Playtime collide Together! Everyone is pitted against each other. Player vs. Orange. Huggy Wuggy vs. Blue, even Mommy Long Legs vs. Green!
instructions: All the above features with the best High-quality graphics and Smooth controls for fighting diving running and swinging
